name: Easy Turkey Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, combine the soup and milk.
2. Stir in the noodles, peas, red pepper, and turkey.
3. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 25 minutes or until hot; stir.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan over medium heat, stir the bread crumbs in hot butter until lightly browned.
5. Top the casserole with the crumbs, then bake an additional 5 minutes more.
Serves 4 (microwave 30 minutes or less).
From OFF DUTY/AMERICA magazine. February-March 93.
Shared by Robert Rostrup
